## Checks

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated files.
- [ ] Citations, identifiers, locators, quotations, and data were not fabricated.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or unauthorized third-party full text are included.
- [ ] Existing citation keys and provenance were preserved where applicable.
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes.
- [ ] Wiki lint passes, or existing warnings are explained.
